description:
About this item
[Maximize Small Spaces]: With space-saving design, this tall corner shelf is specifically designed to fit into tight spaces and maximize limited storage spaces. Its tall and skinny shape allows you to make the most of your available floor space and improves vertical space utilization, making it a perfect addition to your home decor or office. Overall size: 13.39' W x 13.39' D x 78.7' H.
[Multi-functional 7-Tier Tall Bookcase]: Features 7 tiers of open shelves, providing ample storage space for you. This small bookshelf is not just for storing books, it can also be used as a display shelf for your favorite photos, and artwork, and as a bathroom or kitchen storage rack, making it a versatile piece of furniture that will meet all your storage and display needs.
[Stylish & Anti-Falling Baffle Design]: The back panel design can effectively prevent your items from falling off. The unique and elegant diamond pattern design on both sides of the 7-tier bookshelf, not only makes the items placed on the shelf not easy to slip from the side but also makes the shelf more aesthetically pleasing. The wall anti-tip kit makes it easy to fix the bookshelf on the wall to avoid tipping over.
[Sturdy and Long-Lasting]: With a modern black finish, made of high-quality particle board, and a sturdy metal frame, this narrow bookshelf is built to last. The max weight capacity of each shelf is 40 lbs. Adjustable foot pads ensure the skinny tall bookshelf stays stable on uneven floors and avoids scratching the floor.
